summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries in BESS modules shipped to Myanmar should have UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 evidence, with test summaries available to carriers and customs. This applies regardless of whether the shipment enters through Yangon, Thilawa, or Mandalay overland routes.
summary.zh: 发往缅甸的储能模组锂电芯和电池应具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分第38.3节证据，并向承运人和海关提供测试摘要。不论货物经仰光、迪拉瓦或曼德勒陆路路线入境，均应准备。
summary.zht: 發往緬甸的儲能模組鋰電芯和電池應具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第38.3節證據，並向承運人和海關提供測試摘要。不論貨物經仰光、迪拉瓦或曼德勒陸路路線入境，均應準備。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
UN 3480 or UN 3481 classification as applicable
Carrier and Myanmar customs dangerous-goods documentation practice

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: UN 38.3 is shared internationally, so the technical test is not the main gap. The gap is shipment-level traceability: the report, test summary, model numbers, SDS, invoice, and packing list must match the actual cells or modules shipped.
gap.zh: UN 38.3为国际通用要求，因此技术测试本身不是主要差距。差距在于货运级追溯：报告、测试摘要、型号、SDS、发票和装箱单必须与实际发运电芯或模组一致。
gap.zht: UN 38.3為國際通用要求，因此技術測試本身不是主要差距。差距在於貨運級追溯：報告、測試摘要、型號、SDS、發票和裝箱單必須與實際發運電芯或模組一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for lithium battery dangerous-goods carriage and customs/carrier acceptance.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; UN 38.3 transport evidence is separate and still required for shipment.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep UN 38.3 test summaries tied to the exact shipped cell and module models; China product safety reports alone are not transport documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应保留与实际发运电芯和模组型号一致的UN 38.3测试摘要；中国产品安全报告本身不是运输文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應保留與實際發運電芯和模組型號一致的UN 38.3測試摘要；中國產品安全報告本身不是運輸文件。

requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Routing via Yangon, Thilawa, or Mandalay
requirement_topic.zh: 经仰光、迪拉瓦或曼德勒的危险品路线
requirement_topic.zht: 經仰光、迪拉瓦或曼德勒的危險品路線

summary.en: BESS lithium battery shipments may enter Myanmar through Yangon or Thilawa by sea, or Mandalay overland. The shipment should be classified under the correct UN number, packaged and labelled as lithium batteries, supported by SDS and emergency information, and cleared through a broker familiar with local dangerous-goods handling.
summary.zh: 储能锂电池货物可经仰光或迪拉瓦海运入境，或经曼德勒陆路入境。货物应按正确UN编号分类，按锂电池要求包装和贴标，配套SDS及应急信息，并由熟悉当地危险品操作的清关代理办理。
summary.zht: 儲能鋰電池貨物可經仰光或迪拉瓦海運入境，或經曼德勒陸路入境。貨物應按正確UN編號分類，按鋰電池要求包裝和貼標，配套SDS及應急資訊，並由熟悉當地危險品操作的清關代理辦理。

standards_or_laws: UN 3481 lithium ion batteries contained in or packed with equipment
ADR or applicable road dangerous-goods rules for overland transport
Myanmar customs and port handling practice

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: Chinese export documents must be converted into a route-specific dangerous-goods pack for Myanmar entry, including port or border handling requirements and local customs broker instructions.
gap.zh: 中国出口文件必须转换为适用于缅甸入境路线的危险品文件包，包括港口或边境操作要求以及当地清关代理指示。
gap.zht: 中國出口文件必須轉換為適用於緬甸入境路線的危險品文件包，包括港口或邊境操作要求以及當地清關代理指示。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for dangerous-goods logistics and customs clearance; route-specific handling may vary.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; route-specific dangerous-goods documents are separate.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Choose the Myanmar entry route early and prepare the dangerous-goods pack for that route, especially for Yangon, Thilawa, or Mandalay overland clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应尽早确定缅甸入境路线，并按该路线准备危险品文件包，尤其是仰光、迪拉瓦或曼德勒陆路清关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應盡早確定緬甸入境路線，並按該路線準備危險品文件包，尤其是仰光、迪拉瓦或曼德勒陸路清關。
